rows.title: Cancer Guidelines / Guideline Resource Unit public index

rows.notes: Public index for CCA/GURU guideline resources. Exa search on 2026-06-15 identified the page as the official Cancer Guidelines page with GURU contact and disease-site corpus. Public URL does not grant archival, embedding, summarization, graph extraction, redistribution, or commercial-use rights; explicit CCA/GURU permission remains required.
